{{Quote|Our pilot is of an odd sept, and Selonian pilots are often strange. She might act odd from time to time. Pay no attention, and don't be alarmed.|[[Dracmus]]|<ref name="Assault at Selonia">''[[Assault at Selonia]]''</ref>}}
'''Salculd''' was a [[Gender/Legends|sterile female]] [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] with sleek black fur everywhere except her belly, which was light brown. She was a member of the [[Hunchuzuc Den]] living on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. She was bred to be a pilot and flew primitive [[Selonian cone ship]]s. Though Selonians are honest by nature, Salculd was more up front about her opinions than most, and she also occasionally made wisecracks.

During the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]], Salculd and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] did their best to keep their cone ship from falling apart on its trip to [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia]]. The ship was commanded by [[Dracmus]], who was largely unfamiliar with maneuvering a starship and sometimes gave commands that might have placed the crew in danger. When Han convinced Dracmus to defer to his expertise, Salculd was noticeably relieved.

==Appearances==
